image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Enzymes are nature's speedsters, speeding up reactions crucial for life.
Context visual: They lower the activation energy needed for chemical reactions, acting like keys to unlock processes.
Escalation visual: Imagine a world without enzymes. Metabolism would grind to a halt, and life as we know it would cease.
Evidence visual: From digestion to DNA replication, enzymes power every reaction in your body.
Payoff visual: These molecular machines are incredibly specific, ensuring the right reactions happen at the right time.
Cta visual: Curious about how enzymes shape our world? Hit that follow for more science insights!
